title: Portal comment from requestor including attachments are not added to the files gallery
excerpt: Would like a feature so that in Monday Service a requestor comments on an open ticket from within the portal and attaches a document or picture it would be nice if it automatically was added to the files gallery for the …

posts.author: mattzx11 (Matthew Haines)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like a feature so that in Monday Service a requestor comments on an open ticket from within the portal and attaches a document or picture it would be nice if it automatically was added to the files gallery for the ticket. This feature already exists for attachments from emails. It would be great to have it do the same thing with comments.
